tsTroubleshooting.domains: (topic tsTroubleshooting) (topic hi-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic ut-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic sw-d) (topic ui-d) (topic oce-d) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c tsTroubleshooting oceTroubleshooting-c)
tsTroubleshooting.title: 11987 Service database was removed

abstract.p: This error occurs if the service history database is corrupted.

This typically happens after the Hansiplast recovery procedure was executed because the printer was switched off with the power switch (the database was corrupted at the power off time but the service history database is not part of the data restored by Hansiplast).

tsResolve.p: Delete the corrupted database with the dedicated SDS test
Execute SDS test 59. (System Service > Special tests > Controller -> 59 Delete service history database)
This also happens in the factory at the end of the production stage.
If this occurs with a date stamp before the first customer install, this is a logged during manufacturing and not an issue.
